examples: It's said that clichés are the worst sin a writer can commit, but to an oral bard, they were essential.
Never ask a bard to play the banjo.
They speak of Bard with warmth and frustration.
But the director argues that his ruthless appropriation of the Bard makes a statement.
Bard and Tyco of creating a monopoly in catheters and Premier and Novation of enabling it.
